description_long: This is a modern, tactical rifle with a distinctive yellow body and black and metallic gray components. The rifle features a robust polymer stock, a pistol grip, and a detachable box magazine, all designed for ergonomic handling. The upper receiver is equipped with a full-length Picatinny rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the rifle is fitted with standard iron sights. The barrel is metallic and ends with a flash hider, while the handguard has integrated rails for additional attachments. The overall design suggests a weapon intended for urban or tactical use, with a focus on modularity and durability. The contrasting colors and visible screws and seams highlight its manufactured, utilitarian nature.
description: A modern yellow and gray tactical rifle with a polymer stock, detachable magazine, and iron sights, designed for urban use. Features include a Picatinny rail, ergonomic grip, and a flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the yellow stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, and metallic barrel with flash hider.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel's end, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's yellow body, magazine, and the full Picatinny rail along the top.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel, with the pistol grip and magazine partially visible.
